judge_reason: Both agree on a hand-drawn sketch of a disc-shaped object from two perspectives, but Description B adds specific quoted text and details not present in Description A.
original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch on the document, showing two views of a disc-shaped object.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typewritten document page stamped “CONFIDENTIAL,” containing a long narrative report and a simple hand-drawn sketch at the bottom labeled “Side View” and “Top,” with handwritten-style annotations describing the object’s motion and proportions.*
